message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for new ft-dispatch dependencies in ft-nn and ft-optim

Cargo.lock reflects the addition of ft-dispatch as a direct dependency
for both ft-nn and ft-optim crates. These crates now use DispatchError
and DispatchKeyError types for structured hyperparameter and input
validation errors, requiring the explicit dependency declaration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
